name: KSL NEO Public + Login + Post-Login Exploration

flow_steps.description: From the public site, open the login / sign-in entry point

actions.selector: a:has-text('Login'), button:has-text('Login'), a:has-text('Sign In'), button:has-text('Sign In'), a[href*='login'], button[aria-label*='login' i], [role='button'][aria-label*='login' i]
actions.description: Open the Kotak NEO login flow

flow_steps.description: Enter the registered mobile number and continue to OTP

actions.selector: input[type='tel'], input[inputmode='numeric'], input[autocomplete='tel'], input[name*='mobile' i], input[id*='mobile' i], input[placeholder*='mobile' i], input[placeholder*='phone' i], input[aria-label*='mobile' i], input[aria-label*='phone' i], input:not([type='password']):visible
actions.description: Enter the Kotak NEO phone number

actions.selector: button:has-text('Continue'), button:has-text('Next'), button:has-text('Proceed'), button:has-text('Get OTP'), button:has-text('Send OTP'), button:has-text('Verify'), button[type='submit'], input[type='submit']
actions.description: Continue to the OTP verification screen

flow_steps.description: Wait for user OTP entry and resume after successful authentication

actions.description: User enters OTP manually and completes the NEO login
actions.instructions: When the OTP screen appears, enter the OTP manually in the browser and complete any final sign-in or trust-device steps. The scanner will resume automatically once a post-login screen is visible. Any manual route changes during this step will be captured in the route log.

flow_steps.description: Explore all reachable post-login screens, menus, tabs, drawers, detail pages, and modals

actions.description: Explore every reachable authenticated Kotak NEO route including portfolio, watchlist, orders, positions, funds, profile, settings, support, and nested detail screens

exploration_profile.persona: Behave like a real Kotak NEO customer after login. Follow the main investing journey first: home/landing, watchlists, market movers, option chain, portfolio, positions, orders, funds, profile, settings, support, and detail pages opened from lists or cards. Prefer breadth across major product surfaces before FAQ/privacy/legal or one-off accessibility toggles.
journey_rules: If a list of tradable instruments, holdings, watchlist rows, or cards is visible, open at least one item detail before leaving that section.
After entering a major section, explore sibling tabs, filters, and drawers before backing out.
Do not spend multiple steps on pre-login help or recovery flows once authenticated routes are available.
